nasb.text: Baal-hanan the Gederite had charge of the olive and sycamore trees in the Shephelah; and Joash had charge of the stores of oil.

esv.text: Over the olive and sycamore trees in the Shephelah was Baal-hanan the Gederite; and over the stores of oil was Joash.

cnv.text: 管理高原橄欖樹和桑樹的，是基第利人巴力．哈南；管理油庫的，是約阿施；

ccb.text: 基第利人巴勒·哈南管理丘陵的橄榄树和无花果树。约阿施管理油仓。
